entity.summary: Greece-linked non-custodial instant exchange that operated under instaswap.io from at least 2019. The original Greece-based operator ceased operations, and a later operator states that the domain was acquired in Q4 2024 for a new platform under unrelated ownership. HEI keeps the historical entity dead and treats the currently reachable domain as repurposed rather than as continuity of the old exchange.
entity.notes: Retain dead / unknown. The current operator's public response says the Greece-based parent company went bankrupt and the original service ceased in Q1 2022, but no exact primary shutdown date from the former operator is attached. HEI therefore retains the existing 2024-09-18 dated dead-side observation as the conservative terminal marker while recording that the domain now represents an unrelated new operation.

expected.summary: Greece-linked non-custodial exchange or broker-style swap platform that was publicly described as inaccessible and dead by 2024-09-18.
expected.notes: Treat cause conservatively as unknown. Terminal marker uses the 2024-09-18 dead-side update. Launch year is 2019, recorded conservatively as 2019-01-01.

changes.summary: Greece-linked non-custodial instant exchange that operated under instaswap.io from at least 2019. The original Greece-based operator ceased operations, and a later operator states that the domain was acquired in Q4 2024 for a new platform under unrelated ownership. HEI keeps the historical entity dead and treats the currently reachable domain as repurposed rather than as continuity of the old exchange.
changes.notes: Retain dead / unknown. The current operator's public response says the Greece-based parent company went bankrupt and the original service ceased in Q1 2022, but no exact primary shutdown date from the former operator is attached. HEI therefore retains the existing 2024-09-18 dated dead-side observation as the conservative terminal marker while recording that the domain now represents an unrelated new operation.

evidence.title: InstaSwap.io Terms and Conditions
evidence.notes: Archived terms identify the historical instaswap.io service and Greece-organized BLOCKTECH P.C., supporting separation of the original entity from later domain ownership.

evidence.title: Current InstaSwap operator response on the legacy instaswap.io service
evidence.notes: The current operator states that the old Greece-based service ceased after its parent company's bankruptcy and that InstaSwap.com acquired the domain in Q4 2024 under new, unrelated ownership. This is treated as a current-operator statement, not a primary shutdown notice from the former entity.

evidence.title: Current InstaSwap platform
evidence.notes: Current platform evidence confirms that the InstaSwap brand and redirected domain are in active use by a later operation; HEI does not treat that operation as continuity of the historical Greece-based entity.
